message: Operation 'metastore.projects.locations.operations.cancel' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, poor_ai_interpretability. Missing summary. Description is overly verbose and technical with implementation details that confuse AI agent interpretation. data.current_description: Starts asynchronous cancellation on a long-running operation. The server makes a best effort to cancel the operation, but success is not guaranteed. If the server doesn't support this method, it returns google.rpc.Code.UNIMPLEMENTED. Clients can use Operations.GetOperation or other methods to check whether the cancellation succeeded or whether the operation completed despite cancellation. On successful cancellation, the operation is not deleted; instead, it becomes an operation with an Operation.error value with a google.rpc.Status.code of 1, corresponding to Code.CANCELLED.
data.summary_suggestion: Request cancellation of a long-running operation
data.description_suggestion: Requests asynchronous cancellation of a long-running operation. Cancellation is best-effort and not guaranteed to succeed. On successful cancellation, the operation transitions to a CANCELLED state with an error status code of 1 (Code.CANCELLED) and is not deleted. Use Operations.GetOperation to verify cancellation status. Returns an empty response. If the server doesn't support this method, returns UNIMPLEMENTED error.
data.reasoning: Missing summary. Description is overly verbose and technical with implementation details that confuse AI agent interpretation. Simplified to focus on the operation's intent (request cancellation), expected behavior (best-effort, state transition), verification method, and return value. Removed redundant technical details while preserving essential information.
